# daytona_accept_organization_invitation (Action)

Accepts a Daytona organization invitation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_accept_organization_invitation" "example" {
  config {
    invitation_id = "invitation-id"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `invitation_id` (String) Daytona organization invitation ID.
